cards.title: Voice AI Integrations: Automating Enterprise Workflows with AI Agents
tldr: **Telnyx offers Voice AI integrations to automate enterprise workflows using real-time AI agents.**
The platform provides various communication APIs including Voice AI, Speech-to-Text, and Text-to-Speech.
These integrations are designed for sectors like contact centers, finance, and logistics to enhance operational efficiency.

cards.title: AI project management platform launched for SME contractors
tldr: **An AI project management platform has been launched specifically for small and medium-sized enterprise (SME) contractors.**
This new platform aims to integrate artificial intelligence into project workflows for construction firms.
It targets improving efficiency and project delivery for smaller companies in the construction industry.

cards.title: Can AI help project managers learn how software actually gets built?
tldr: **The article initiates a discussion on AI's potential to help project managers understand software development.**
It explores how artificial intelligence could bridge knowledge gaps for project managers in technical project contexts.
The discussion aims to identify practical applications of AI for enhancing project managers' technical comprehension.

cards.title: AI+ Project Management Office Practitioner™ Certification
tldr: **NetCom Learning offers an AI+ Project Management Office Practitioner™ Certification to enhance PMO decision-making.**
The certification covers AI applications in predictive planning, resource management, and proactive risk management for PMOs.
It assesses understanding of AI in PMO governance, portfolio management, and enterprise project reporting frameworks.

cards.title: I Let AI Write to My Database (With Guardrails) - DEV Community
tldr: An article details building an AI workflow for ChatGPT to write structured data to a Supabase database.
The Supascribe system incorporates human-in-the-loop review and guardrails for data integrity and control.
This demonstrates a controlled AI data generation approach, relevant to automated documentation or data entry.

cards.title: Building Query Expert MCP: Using RAG to Build an Analytics Agent ...
tldr: **Block's Query Expert MCP uses RAG to build an analytics agent for self-serve insights.**
It automates documentation for 11,000+ tables and categorizes 1M SQL query patterns.
The agent captures institutional data knowledge and domain expertise for a 12,000-person organization.

cards.title: Sustainable Retail Planning with AI - Impact Analytics
tldr: **Impact Analytics offers AI-powered decision intelligence for sustainable retail planning and performance.**
Solutions include ForecastSmart for demand planning and InventorySmart for optimizing inventory across SKUs.
These AI tools help retailers maximize space efficiency and improve overall operational sustainability.

cards.title: When the Software Thinks for Itself: AI and Change Management
tldr: The article highlights the necessity of robust change management strategies for successful AI software adoption.
It discusses how AI is transforming workflows and the challenges of integrating new intelligent systems.
Effective change management ensures user buy-in and maximizes the operational benefits of AI automation.

cards.title: Best AI Tools for Project Management in 2026: Reviews & Comparison
tldr: **The article reviews and compares leading AI tools for project management in 2026, focusing on scheduling, automation, and team fit.**
It details features of tools like Motion (smart scheduling) and Asana (AI goal and project setup, task summaries).
The comparison helps project managers select tools that prevent team overload and unify tasks for improved project delivery.

cards.title: AI project governance checklist. - Protecht
tldr: **Protecht offers an AI project governance checklist for structured self-assessment of AI projects.**
It helps organizations identify hidden AI risks and strengthen governance for AI deployments.
The checklist aims to improve operational resilience and accountability in AI project implementation.

cards.title: AI TPRM Explained: Benefits, Use Cases, and the Future - viso trust
tldr: **AI-powered Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) enhances vendor risk management with speed and intelligence.**
The platform offers instant AI risk assessments, continuous monitoring, and automated vendor communications.
It helps organizations achieve continuous audit and compliance readiness by streamlining vendor oversight.

cards.title: From Grammar Checker to AI Productivity Platform - SoftwarePlaza
tldr: **Grammarly transforms from a grammar checker into an AI productivity platform.**
It is redefining enterprise communication through advanced AI capabilities.
This evolution positions Grammarly as a key tool for enhancing organizational writing efficiency.

cards.title: 7 Best Project Planning Tools for Teams of All Sizes
tldr: **The article identifies and reviews the 7 best project planning tools for teams of all sizes.**
It covers tools that assist with managing time, work, growth, and hiring within project environments.
The guide helps teams select suitable software for efficient project planning and execution.

cards.title: Risk assessment project in AI Risk and Compliance - ServiceNow
tldr: **ServiceNow details a project for AI risk assessment and compliance management.**
The article focuses on establishing governance for AI-driven systems.
This approach could assist organizations in managing AI project risks effectively.

cards.title: Claude Code 2 Automation Expands with Loops, Schedules, and 100+ Workflows
tldr: **Claude Code 2 introduces enhanced automation with loops, schedules, and over 100 pre-built workflows.**
The new `/loop command` enables automating repetitive tasks within a session, featuring a three-day expiration safeguard.
Users can schedule tasks for recurring workflows and integrate with platforms like Google for data processing.

cards.title: Zoom expands agentic AI platform to automate workflows across ...
tldr: **Zoom expands its agentic AI platform to automate workflows across collaboration and customer experience products.**
New capabilities include custom AI agents, workflow orchestration, and AI Companion expansion across Zoom products.
Organizations can automate tasks and trigger workflows from interactions, potentially assisting with project follow-ups.

cards.title: Morgen vs Motion: AI Daily Planner Comparison
tldr: Morgen and Motion are AI-powered daily planners designed to automatically generate schedules in your calendar.
Morgen offers features like AI planning, task management, calendar automation, and team workflows.
These tools aim to optimize individual and team daily schedules by integrating tasks and calendar events.

cards.title: This AI Tool Builds Polished Presentations in Seconds
tldr: **PowerPresent AI is an AI tool designed to create polished presentations rapidly.**
The article promotes a lifetime subscription offer for PowerPresent AI, highlighting its efficiency.
It aims to streamline the creation of professional-looking slides for various business communication needs.

cards.title: Gumloop lands $50M from Benchmark to turn every employee into an AI agent builder
tldr: Gumloop raised $50M from Benchmark to enable every employee to build AI agents.
The company aims to democratize AI agent creation, making it accessible across the enterprise.
This approach could foster widespread automation and custom AI solution development within organizations.

cards.title: The AI Maturity Curve for Knowledge Management - Atlassian
tldr: **Atlassian outlines an AI maturity curve for optimizing knowledge management practices.**
Their Rovo platform provides AI-powered apps leveraging team knowledge for enhanced collaboration.
This framework offers insights that could assist PMOs in improving project information accessibility.
